CC1.name: Control Environment
CC1.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

CC5.1.name: Risk Assessment
CC5.1.description: The entity identifies and assesses risks to the achievement of its objectives.
CC5.1.remediation: Document risk assessment procedures and conduct regular reviews

CC5.2.name: Assignment of Responsibility
CC5.2.description: The entity defines and assigns responsibility for key security functions.
CC5.2.remediation: Create CODEOWNERS file to define code review responsibilities
CC5.2.audit_focus: Clear ownership and accountability for code changes

CC6.1.name: Logical Access Security
CC6.1.description: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against unauthorized access.
CC6.1.remediation: Enable branch protection requiring PR reviews and status checks
CC6.1.audit_focus: Access controls preventing unauthorized code changes
CC6.1.business_impact: CRITICAL - Unauthorized code could introduce security vulnerabilities or malicious code

CC6.6.name: Boundary Protection
CC6.6.description: The entity implements controls to prevent unauthorized access at system boundaries.
CC6.6.remediation: Use secret scanning, remove hardcoded credentials, use environment variables
CC6.6.audit_focus: Protection of sensitive data and credentials

CC7.1.name: Detection of Changes
CC7.1.description: The entity monitors systems to detect anomalies and security violations.
CC7.1.remediation: Enable Dependabot alerts and security scanning

CC7.2.name: Security Incident Response
CC7.2.description: The entity responds to detected security incidents and vulnerabilities.
CC7.2.remediation: Create SECURITY.md with vulnerability reporting procedures

CC8.1.name: Change Management Process
CC8.1.description: The entity manages changes to system components to minimize risk.
CC8.1.remediation: Configure Dependabot for automated dependency updates

CC9.1.name: Risk Mitigation
CC9.1.description: The entity identifies, assesses, and manages risks from vendor and business partner relationships.
CC9.1.remediation: Implement license scanning and dependency review
